puzzle_context:
This is a logic puzzle. There are 3 houses (numbered 1 on the left, 3 on the right), from the perspective of someone standing across the street from them. Each has a different person in them. They have different characteristics:
 - Each person has a unique name: arnold, bob, eric
 - People have different favorite book genres: romance, fantasy, mystery
 - People have different favorite sports: volleyball, basketball, soccer
core_rules: The person who loves volleyball is Arnold.
The person who loves soccer and Eric are not in the same house.
Eric and the person who loves soccer are not next to each other.
The person who loves fantasy books is in the third house.
The person who loves romance books and the person who loves basketball are not in the same house.
The person who loves mystery books is in the second house.

The person who loves mystery books is in the second house.
question: What is Name of the person who lives in House 2?
